mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END FROM party_cycle WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN (#{pendingStatus}, #{runningStatus})

SELECT id, party_id, cycle_no, start_at, end_at, billing_due_at, status, member_count_snapshot, price_per_member_snapshot, created_at, updated_at FROM party_cycle WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND status IN (#{pendingStatus}, #{runningStatus}) ORDER BY cycle_no DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, party_id, cycle_no, start_at, end_at, billing_due_at, status, member_count_snapshot, price_per_member_snapshot, created_at, updated_at FROM party_cycle WHERE id = #{partyCycleId} LIMIT 1

SELECT id, party_id, cycle_no, start_at, end_at, billing_due_at, status, member_count_snapshot, price_per_member_snapshot, created_at, updated_at FROM party_cycle WHERE party_id = #{partyId} AND cycle_no = #{cycleNo} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO party_cycle ( party_id, cycle_no, start_at, end_at, billing_due_at, status, member_count_snapshot, price_per_member_snapshot, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{partyId}, #{cycleNo}, #{startAt}, #{endAt}, #{billingDueAt}, #{status}, #{memberCountSnapshot}, #{pricePerMemberSnapshot}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE party_cycle SET member_count_snapshot = #{memberCountSnapshot}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{partyCycleId}
